sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الضِّيَافَةُ جُزْءًا أَسَاسِيًّا مِنَ الثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Gostoprimstvo se smatra osnovnim dijelom arapske kulture.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality is considered a fundamental part of Arab culture.

sentences.arabic: يَقُومُ الْمُضِيفُ بِاسْتِقْبَالِ الضُّيُوفِ بِحَرَارَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ فِي مَنْزِلِهِ.
sentences.translation: Domaćin prima goste s velikom toplinom u svom domu.
sentences.translationEn: The host receives guests with great warmth in his home.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُ الْعَرَبُ الْقَهْوَةَ الْمُرَّةَ وَالتَّمْرَ لِلزُّوَّارِ عِنْدَ وُصُولِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Arapi nude gorku kafu i hurme posjetiocima po njihovom dolasku.
sentences.translationEn: Arabs offer bitter coffee and dates to visitors upon their arrival.

sentences.arabic: يُشْعِرُ هَذَا الْكَرَمُ الضَّيْفَ بِأَنَّهُ فَرْدٌ مِنَ الْعَائِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova velikodušnost čini da se gost osjeća kao član porodice.
sentences.translationEn: This generosity makes the guest feel like a member of the family.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَمِرُّ التَّرْحِيبُ طَوَالَ فَتْرَةِ الزِّيَارَةِ بِكَلَامٍ طَيِّبٍ.
sentences.translation: Dobrodošlica se nastavlja tokom cijele posjete uz lijepe riječi.
sentences.translationEn: The welcome continues throughout the visit with kind words.
